description: Style NoteNow give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of tan brown sandals from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Product DetailsSandals with black leather upper with perforations and mesh detailingThe ankle strap is fastened by a velcro closureSoft and foamy footbedOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with geometrical shaped lugs Material and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
